release_notes: - Fixed microphone identified as Browser instead of Teams during Teams app meetings. - Fixed external device change detection race condition causing false alerts. - Stale meeting watchdog: forces device OFF if Teams WebSocket goes silent for 2 minutes. - Microphone polling fallback for USB audio devices (Yealink, Brave Browser). - Web meetings (Meet, Zoom Web) no longer end prematurely after 10 seconds. - Shortcut confirmation window: dark mode, Focus Mode offset, improved timing. - Check for Updates now responds on first click. - Fixed manual count in statistics window. - Fixed crash when Check for update is triggered. Added a 0.1s delay.
